title: WazirX - Rekt
relevance_summary: Multisig wallet upgrade with compromised keys and signature phishing

prevention.rule: Block any tx that attempts to upgrade a multisig wallet with suspicious signatures.

red_flags: Failed USDT transfer just before the hack
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that attempts to upgrade a multisig wallet with suspicious signatures.
summary: WazirX was hacked through a multisig wallet upgrade using compromised keys and signature phishing. A guard could have detected and blocked the upgrade attempt by monitoring for suspicious signatures.
